Class MapModel

java.lang.Object
model.MapModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MapModel extends Object implements Serializable
Central model of the application map. It stores medical sites, user points, drone bases, drones, and spatial structures: Voronoi diagram and Delaunay triangulation.
See Also:

    • addMedicalStaff

      public void addMedicalStaff(MedicalStaff staff)
      Adds a medical staff member and registers them as a UserPoint at their hospital position, so Voronoi statistics count them.
      Parameters:
      staff - the medical staff member to add

    • removeMedicalStaff

      public void removeMedicalStaff(MedicalStaff staff)
      Removes a medical staff member and their associated UserPoint.
      Parameters:
      staff - the medical staff member to remove

    • getMedicalStaffByHospital

      public List<MedicalStaff> getMedicalStaffByHospital(Hospital hospital)
      Returns all medical staff members working at a given hospital.
      Parameters:
      hospital - the hospital to filter by
      Returns:
      list of medical staff at that hospital

    • getAllMedicalStaff

      public List<MedicalStaff> getAllMedicalStaff()
      Returns all medical staff members registered in the system.
      Returns:
      list of all medical staff

    • findMedicalStaffById

      public MedicalStaff findMedicalStaffById(String id)
      Finds a medical staff member by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the staff ID
      Returns:
      the MedicalStaff, or null if not found
